evals.prompt: sequence diagram of the orchestra planning pipeline
evals.expected_output: Mermaid sequence diagram written to .orchestra/uml/. Valid sequenceDiagram syntax. Shows the PRD → Spec → Gherkin → implement → review → merge flow.
assertions: File contains a fenced mermaid code block
Diagram shows at least 5 message arrows
Diagram filename is kebab-case and descriptive

evals.prompt: deployment diagram showing on-device vs cloud components
evals.expected_output: Mermaid graph TB with subgraphs for on-device and cloud. Valid syntax.
assertions: Diagram contains at least 2 subgraph blocks
Subgraphs are labeled meaningfully (e.g. On-Device, Cloud)
Diagram shows at least one connection between subgraphs
